title: stachys officinalis subsp. haussknechtii
intro: Stachys officinalis subsp. haussknechtii, also known as Haussknecht's betony or Betonica, is a subspecies of the Stachys officinalis plant, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Stachys officinalis subsp. haussknechtii include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
